name: dth-character-studio
description: Declarative character & ROM administration for the DazToHue (DTH) workflow — generates the Daz ROM scripts and the Houdini PoseAsset CSV from one definition. Runs as a standalone web app or an Electron desktop app.

scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n web,app -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @dth/web dev" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:4330 && pnpm --filter @dth/desktop dev"
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter @dth/web build && pnpm --filter @dth/web bundle:server && pnpm --filter @dth/desktop build
